tracks.rawText: 2:16Rod Stewart - Da Ya Think I'm Sexy ？ (Edward Newgate Remix) [zuguIAvRpzE]UploadLatin-infused dance-pop at 128 BPM in G minor, The track features a prominent acoustic guitar playing syncopated, flamenco-style strumming patterns and melodic riffs, A heavy electronic kick drum and sharp snare provide a reggaeton-influenced dembow rhythm, The bass is a deep, sub-heavy synth that follows the kick pattern, Bright, staccato brass stabs punctuate the transitions, Female vocals are processed with light pitch correction and doubling, while male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style, High-frequency synth plucks and percussive woodblock hits add rhythmic texture throughout2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rod Stewart - Da Ya Think I'm Sexy ？ (Edward Newgate Remix) [zuguIAvRpzE]

tracks.rawText: 2:40Rod Stewart - Da Ya Think I'm Sexy ？ (Edward Newgate Remix) [zuguIAvRpzE]v5.5World-class salsa at a dance-floor tempo with slap bass, four-on-the-floor kick, syncopated electric guitar scratches, bright synth stabs, and female lead vocals up front, Horn hits, congas, timbales, bongos, piano montunos, and hand percussion drive a polished, high-energy groove with tight call-and-response and sharp brass accents2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rod Stewart - Da Ya Think I'm Sexy ？ (Edward Newgate Remix) [zuguIAvRpzE]
